On Jan. 12, detectives in Montgomery County received a video depicting a 65-year-old day-care operator interacting with a 2-year-old child, police said.

The child was playing with a toy in the care of the woman when the video shows her reaching under the child and pulling down her pants, according to police.

The woman is accused of exposing her genitals to the child and performing a sexual act on the child, police said.

The woman was arrested on Feb. 21 and charged with indecent exposure and endangering the welfare of a child.

Montgomery County police said they were called to the day-care at approximately 12:45 p.m. on Feb. 22.

Police said the day-care was closed on the day the incident occurred and no children were present at the time.

The day-care has been closed pending the outcome of the investigation, police said.
